title: sideroxylon argan
intro: Sideroxylon argan, also known as the argan tree, is a species of tree that belongs to the family Sapotaceae. The argan tree has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, particularly in North Africa, due to its rich medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with the argan tree include improving skin health, reducing inflammation, and protecting against oxidative stress, making it a popular ingredient in skincare products and supplements. The argan tree can be prepared in various herbal forms, including argan oil, which is extracted from the seeds, and argan tea, which is made by infusing the leaves in hot water.
